textByHashes.2e1e29ff7c33d566153e76592242205769c31a61: I'm blending in. Scopin' out the place.
textByHashes.e218098a76bddfb126be977277a6022da80a1d26: Let's just say there are some wealthy people about, with full pockets.
textByHashes.d7dede5b15165c5a917d62690dc934642c25755a: I'm quite sneaky. Every now and then I'll get their attention so their pockets aren't being so carefully watched.
textByHashes.3ef80f2c5c591ffabb35f1ae1578a8fd9c390ce3: Now leave me be. I'm already distracting!
